caribbean.headline: Eastern Caribbean Seas Building at St. Maarten
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten in the Eastern Caribbean is the highest-impact location in the Caribbean this period, with winds peaking at 18 kt and seas building to 5.8 ft on an E swell at 9s periods. Rain probability reaches 33% -- isolated showers possible but conditions remain manageable for cruise operations.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Threat Dominates Western Mediterranean at Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz in the Western Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 19 kt and seas to 3.7 ft on a W swell at 8s periods. Rain probability reaches 70% -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.
